chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Month of Ramadan and the Reward of Fasting in it

text: 1839 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ : «إِلاَّ مَنْ أَفْطَرَ عَلَى مُسْكِرٍ أَوْ مشاحن [مُشَاحِناً] أَوْ صَاحِبَ شَاهَيْنِ وَ هُوَ اَلشِّطْرَنْجُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1839 - In the narration of Umar ibn Yazid:
"Except for those who break their fast with an intoxicant, harbor enmity [Mushahinan], or are engaged with shahīn (which refers to chess)."
